heading: White Cane Safety Day
label: 142 White Cane Safety Day
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)14236:169d., , .Oct. 6, 1964Pub. L. 88–62878 Stat. 1003
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)14236:169d., , .Oct. 6, 1964Pub. L. 88–62878 Stat. 1003

children.text: designating October 15 as White Cane Safety Day; and
calling on the people of the United States to observe White Cane Safety Day with appropriate ceremonies and activities.
